cedict_en: disembodied spirit; ghost; devil/(suffix) person with a certain vice or addiction etc/sly; crafty; resourceful (variant of 詭|诡[gui3])/one of the 28 constellations of ancient Chinese astronomy
honest and prudent/variant of 願|愿[yuan4]/(bound form) wish; hope; desire/to be willing/to wish (that sth may happen); may .../vow; pledge
old variant of 射[she4]/to shoot/to launch/to allude to/radio- (chemistry)
variant of 戲|戏[xi4]/trick/drama/play/show/CL:齣|出[chu1],場|场[chang3],臺|台[tai2]
to remain; to be left over
to start (a machine)/(fig.) to set in motion/to launch (an operation)/to activate (a plan)
until/(used in combination with words like 到[dao4] or 至[zhi4] in constructs of the form 到...為止|到...为止)
